testsuite.name: api.SoapRequestTest

testcase.name: testSoapRequestNegative

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <500> but was <200>.

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <500> but was <200>.

testcase.name: testSoapRequestWithAssertions

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: El resultado no es el esperado expected [five hundred] but found []

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: El resultado no es el esperado expected [five hundred] but found [] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:110) at testsuite.system-out:
?[32mPRUEBA DE CASO NEGATIVO: ?[0m HTTP/1.1 200 OK Cache-Control: private, max-age=0 Content-Type: text/xml; charset=utf-8 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Server: Server Web-Service: DataFlex 19.1 X-Powered-By: ASP.NET Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin X-Robots-Tag: noai, noimageai tdm-reservation: 1 Content-Security-Policy: default-src * data: 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=15768000;includeSubdomains X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Permissions-Policy: interest-cohort=(); fullscreen=(self) Date: Tue, 31 Mar 2026 21:49:00 GMT Content-Length: 355
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <soap:Body> <m:NumberToWordsResponse xmlns:m="http://www.dataaccess.com/webservicesserver/"> <m:NumberToWordsResult>twelve million nine hundred and eighty eight thousand five hundred and seventy seven </m:NumberToWordsResult> </m:NumberToWordsResponse> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope> ?[32mFORMA DE HACERLO 2: ?[0m HTTP/1.1 200 OK Cache-Control: private, max-age=0 Content-Type: text/xml; charset=utf-8 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Server: Server Web-Service: DataFlex 19.1 X-Powered-By: ASP.NET Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin X-Robots-Tag: noai, noimageai tdm-reservation: 1 Content-Security-Policy: default-src * data: 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=15768000;includeSubdomains X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Permissions-Policy: interest-cohort=(); fullscreen=(self) Date: Tue, 31 Mar 2026 21:49:00 GMT Content-Length: 313
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <soap:Body> <m:NumberToWordsResponse xmlns:m="http://www.dataaccess.com/webservicesserver/"> <m:NumberToWordsResult>five hundred </m:NumberToWordsResult> </m:NumberToWordsResponse> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope> ?[32mESTE ES EL CUERPO DE LA RESPUESTA: DE LA FORMA 2: ?[0m<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <soap:Body> <m:NumberToWordsResponse xmlns:m="http://www.dataaccess.com/webservicesserver/"> <m:NumberToWordsResult>five hundred </m:NumberToWordsResult> </m:NumberToWordsResponse> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope> ?[32mEL RESULTADO ES: ?[0m ?[32mPRUEBA DE CASO POSITIVO: ?[0m ?[32mFORMA DE HACERLO 1: ?[0m<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="http://www.dataaccess.com/webservicesserver/"> <soap:Body> <tns:NumberToWords> <tns:ubiNum>500</tns:ubiNum> </tns:NumberToWords> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>
HTTP/1.1 200 OK Cache-Control: private, max-age=0 Content-Type: text/xml; charset=utf-8 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Server: Server Web-Service: DataFlex 19.1 X-Powered-By: ASP.NET Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin X-Robots-Tag: noai, noimageai tdm-reservation: 1 Content-Security-Policy: default-src * data: 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=15768000;includeSubdomains X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Permissions-Policy: interest-cohort=(); fullscreen=(self) Date: Tue, 31 Mar 2026 21:49:01 GMT Content-Length: 313
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <soap:Body> <m:NumberToWordsResponse xmlns:m="http://www.dataaccess.com/webservicesserver/"> <m:NumberToWordsResult>five hundred </m:NumberToWordsResult> </m:NumberToWordsResponse> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope> ?[32mESTE ES EL CUEROPO DE LA RESPUESTA: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <soap:Body> <m:NumberToWordsResponse xmlns:m="http://www.dataaccess.com/webservicesserver/"> <m:NumberToWordsResult>five hundred </m:NumberToWordsResult> </m:NumberToWordsResponse> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>
